system.flavor: Your senses sync with those of the herd, and you strike as one.
system.effect:
Stance this stance, you gain aura 1:
• If there are 3 or more allies or allied summons in the area, attacks against you and allies in the aura gain [-]. Increase this to [-][-] against you or any ally in crisis.
• Foes in the aura take +1 damage from summons
Heavy the action cost of this ability to 1. If there are 3 or more adjacent allies or allied summons to you, reduce it further to quick.
